seed_problem: ALE-Bench pickup-delivery selective tour (ahc006/027/039); Frontier-CS routing
mutation: composite: prize-collecting SELECTIVE pickup-delivery TSP with precedence on a Manhattan gantry -- choose a subset of pairs AND output one depot-to-depot precedence-constrained tour; objective = total travel + skip penalties (min)
title: Array Gantry Segment Ferrying
strategies: do-nothing baseline: serve no task, pay every downtime penalty (calibration point)
profit-filter greedy: serve each task whose penalty exceeds its standalone round-trip, chained by nearest-neighbour on pickups with consecutive P-then-D

cheapest-insertion with precedence: grow one route, insert each task's pickup/delivery at cheapest positions (pickup earlier), accept when insertion cost < penalty; multi-pass so shared travel pulls in more tasks
local search: 2-opt / or-opt on the served route plus add/drop moves on the selection set
